name: UPND Free Education & CDF Tour
objective: Verify awareness of educational benefits and local CDF projects.
mainMessage: Education for all: We have delivered free education to every child. Now, we are bringing development to your ward through CDF.
talkingPoints: No more school fees from primary to secondary.
K30.6 million CDF: Decided by YOU in this ward.
Teacher and Health Worker recruitment: 40,000+ new jobs.
Restored law and order: Peace in our markets.

questions.prompt: Is your household benefiting from the Free Education policy?
Which CDF project in this ward do you find most helpful?
How likely are you to support HH in the next election?

name: UPND Victory 2026 Mobilization
objective: Mobilize support and announce final manifesto points at major venues.
mainMessage: Uniting for Victory: Securing Zambia's future through development and transparency.
talkingPoints: Youth Employment: Launch of the National Internship Scheme.
Healthcare: Refurbishment of all District Hospitals.
